dashboard.label: Agent Risk Overview
dashboard.description: Live counters and severity breakdown for Aegis verdicts. Full Dashboard Studio v2 implementation lands in story-app-05; this stub keeps the nav link resolvable.

html.p: This dashboard is a placeholder. The full implementation (Dashboard Studio v2 with severity breakdown by hour, top-N agents by HIGH-severity count, and MSJ scaling indicator) lands in story-app-05.
The data is already flowing — try the underlying searches in the meantime:

li.code: `aegis_data` severity=HIGH earliest=-24h | stats count by agent_id | sort -count
